title: Read Anemometer Wind Speed
content: Converts anemometer pulse frequency to wind speed in m/s and km/h using a calibration factor.
signature: def read_anemometer(pulse_hz: float, calibration_factor: float = 2.4) -> dict
code:
def read_anemometer(pulse_hz: float, calibration_factor: float = 2.4) -> dict:
    """Convert anemometer pulse frequency to wind speed.

    The Sparkfun / Davis anemometer produces 1 pulse per rotation.  One
    rotation per second corresponds to 2.4 km/h (empirically calibrated).

    Args:
        pulse_hz:            Pulse frequency in Hz (rotations per second).
        calibration_factor:  km/h per Hz (default 2.4 for Davis anemometer).

    Returns:
        dict with 'wind_speed_kmh' (float) and 'wind_speed_ms' (float).
    """
    wind_kmh = round(pulse_hz * calibration_factor, 3)
    wind_ms = round(wind_kmh / 3.6, 3)
    return {'wind_speed_kmh': wind_kmh, 'wind_speed_ms': wind_ms}

benchmark_tests.name: calm_wind
benchmark_tests.description: 0 Hz should return 0 km/h and 0 m/s.
